title: submit-flow-batch output data
description:
Shape of the ``data`` field on a successful ``submit-flow-batch`` envelope.

Wraps a list of per-spec result records (each matching
submit_flow.output.json) plus a count for cheap iteration. Order
of ``results`` matches the order of input ``specs``.

results.description: Per-spec submit-flow result, in input order. Each entry has the shape of submit_flow.output.json (run_id, job_ids, total_tasks, deduped, canary_done, canary_run_id, canary_job_ids).
results.title: Results

n_results.description: Length of `results`. Equals the number of input specs (deduped specs still contribute one result entry with deduped=true).
n_results.title: N Results

_SubmitFlowResultEntry.description:
One per-spec submit-flow result inside a batch envelope.

Mirrors submit_flow.output.json (same fields). Kept as a separate
model so the batch wrapper schema doesn't reference
``submit_flow.output.json#`` cross-file — single self-contained file.
_SubmitFlowResultEntry.title: _SubmitFlowResultEntry
